manifest.author: votsz
manifest.changelog:
CHANGELOG DETAILED 🇺🇸

■ By holding a message in direct you can view without the person knowing that you have seen it (for now)

■ Instagram for tablet in settings

■ Possibility to add a separate caption for each post in a carousel (⛔️ not currently functional)

■ Put banners on the profile of content you like to watch/interest in

■ A quick button to add/move banners from your profile.

■ The lives you do will be saved in your archives.

■ New gender options for those who identify as another gender in the profile tab.

■ It is now possible when editing a stories through the gallery, you drag up to change the photo.

■ The blurred background in the stories is back.

■ Notifications tab has had some changes.

■ New look in the feed and reels related to people you follow and like.

■ I put back the camera in the direct conversations because the gallery started to bug.
manifest.name: votsz's Backup
manifest.description: Backup for those who want new functions before the public, maximum quality and Stable
